message:
AICS NCR Prospect Batch — approval summary

Found: 25 verified prospects
Area: Delhi, Noida, Greater Noida, Ghaziabad/Gurugram/Faridabad/NCR nearby
Outreach sent: 0 — approval pending

Categories + proposed templates:

1) HEALTHCARE-A — 5 prospects
Clinics/diagnostics/dental/aesthetic
Pain: missed patient enquiries + callback visibility

2) EDU-A — 5 prospects
Coaching/training institutes
Pain: course enquiry follow-up + counsellor routing

3) MFG-A — 5 prospects
Manufacturing/export/RFQ businesses
Pain: RFQ/catalogue/quote follow-up leakage

4) RE-A — 1 prospect
Real estate lead routing
Pain: ad/website/WhatsApp leads not tracked properly

5) SALON-A — 2 prospects
Salon/beauty chains
Pain: missed bookings + outlet-wise follow-up

6) FOOD-A — 2 prospects
Restaurant/bakery/food retail
Pain: support/order queries scattered across channels

7) PROF-A — 5 prospects
CA/tax/professional services
Pain: client intake + document follow-up + cloud hygiene

Approval keywords:
APPROVE NCR ALL — approve all 7 template-category mappings
APPROVE HEALTHCARE-A / EDU-A / MFG-A / RE-A / SALON-A / FOOD-A / PROF-A — approve individually
CHANGES — I will revise before any send

After approval, I will send one-by-one only to verified matching prospects using the mapped template and channel.
